description_long: This handgun features a two-tone design with a matte black slide and barrel paired with light-colored grips adorned with a skull and crossbones motif. The frame is robust, with a visible safety lever, slide release, and a prominent trigger guard. The barrel is long and cylindrical, extending slightly beyond the slide, and the muzzle is clearly defined. The grips are smooth with subtle contouring, and the magazine base is flush with the bottom of the grip. The slide has minimal markings, with a small logo and some text visible on one side. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with polymer grip panels, giving it a modern yet classic appearance.
description: A two-tone semi-automatic handgun with a matte black slide, extended barrel, and light grips featuring a skull and crossbones design. The frame is robust, with minimal slide markings and a flush magazine base.
description_view_0: The handgun is viewed directly from the rear, showing the back of the slide, rear sight, and the top of the grip.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the skull and crossbones grip, safety lever, slide release, and minimal slide markings.
description_view_2: The front view highlights the muzzle, barrel opening, and the cylindrical extension of the barrel beyond the slide.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the grip with the skull and crossbones, the trigger, and the slide with a small logo and text.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is light-colored with a smooth, slightly contoured surface and features a prominent black skull and crossbones emblem. It appears to be made of polymer or a similar synthetic material, with a subtle matte finish and no visible checkering or stippling. The grip panels are flat with rounded edges, providing a comfortable hold, and there are no finger grooves or additional ergonomic shaping. The screws securing the grip are visible, adding a utilitarian touch.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth finish with no visible texturing or undercuts, and the curvature is gentle, blending seamlessly into the frame. The guard is robust, offering protection to the trigger without any squared-off edges or integrated accessories.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and cylindrical, extending slightly beyond the slide, with a smooth, unadorned profile. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide. The muzzle is clearly defined, and the barrel appears to be of standard construction without fluting or external embellishments.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features minimal markings, with a small logo and some text visible on the left side near the rear. The markings are subtle and do not dominate the slide's appearance, maintaining a clean and understated look.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no extensions, flaring, or finger rests. It has a simple, utilitarian design with a smooth finish, and no visible logos or texturing.
